chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1. C.P. No.D-413 of 2025 [Shahzado Channa V. Province of Sindh & others]. 2. C.P. No.D-414 of 2025 [Papu V. Province of Sindh & Others]. 3. C.P. No.D-415 of 2025 [Ali Ahmed V. Province of Sindh & others]. 4. C.P. No.D-416 of 2025 [Muhammad V. Province of Sindh & others]. 5. C.P. No.D-420 of 2025 [Yousuf V. Province of Sindh & others]. 6. C.P. No.D-423 of 2025 [Anwar Ali V. Province of Sindh & others]. Present:- Mr. Justice Arbab Ali Hakro, Mr. Justice Riazat Ali Sahar Date of hearing: 07.03.2025 Date of Decision: 07.03.2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General. O R D E R Arbab Ali Hakro, J. The above-captioned petitions, having similar facts and circumstances, are hereby disposed of in the light of precedent set by this bench in orders dated 28.02.2025 (C.P. No.D-282/2025 and others), dated 03.03.2025 (C.P. No.D-324/2025 and others) and dated 04.03.2025 (C.P. No.D-361/2025 and others). In those orders, the concerned Deputy Commissioner(s) were directed to decide the applications of the petitioners within seven days upon receipt of the order. This decision process involves affording the petitioners opportunity for hearing and determining whether their hotel/restaurant/biryani shop/juice corner, etc. qualifies for exemption under Section 5 of the Ehtram-e-Ramzan Ordinance, 1981. Learned A.A.G. Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waives notice and raises no objection to the disposal of these petitions on the same terms. Therefore, the present petitions are also hereby disposed of with the same directions as outlined above. A copy of this order be communicated to learned AAG as well to the concerned Deputy Commissioner(s) for information and compliance.

Therefore, the present petitions are also hereby disposed of with the same directions as outlined above. A copy of this order be communicated to learned AAG as well to the concerned Deputy Commissioner(s) for information and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan Ali
